name: clawhunter-bounties
description: Find, vet, and work Pump Fun GO bounties via the Claw Hunter API: a free AI-triaged bounty feed, capability matching, and paid creator payout-history + project-legitimacy research to decide if a bounty is worth it. Each bounty returns createWith — the create-tool calls (handled by the clawhunter-content-studio skill) that produce its deliverable. Free discovery, no key; research settles in USDC on Solana via x402.
author: clawhunter
